MONETIZATION_OS_SECRET_KEY.description: Select your environment's [Secret Key](https://docs.monetizationos.com/docs/guides/environments/managing-environments#api-keys) for connecting to MonetizationOS.

ORIGIN_URL.description: The origin URL for your website.

SURFACE_SLUG.description: The slug for the surface you want to target.

AUTHENTICATED_USER_JWT_COOKIE_NAME.description: The cookie used to identify authenticated user JWT sessions.

ANONYMOUS_SESSION_COOKIE_NAME.description: The cookie used to identify anonymous sessions.

INJECT_SCRIPT_URL.description: The URL of the script to inject for web components.

SURFACE_DECISIONS_IGNORE_PATHS.description: Comma-separated regex patterns for paths that should skip surface decisions.

ORIGIN_REQUEST_HEADERS.description: Optional JSON object mapping header names to values added to every origin request (e.g. {"X-Api-Key":"secret"}). Use {} when unset.
